backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for AstraVault backend implementing user registration, profile management, custom links CRUD, and vault notes with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the update of mAadhaar and Xiaomi Home URLs in `frontend/src/data/defaultLinks.ts` with high confidence, linked to test REQ-14.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of key frontend source files, describing their roles and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark theme CSS custom properties (colors, radius, sidebar, chart variables) for the AstraVault UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the AstraVault React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading `src/main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with login, dashboard, vault, and settings routes, using an `AuthGuard` to redirect unauthenticated users and wrap protected pages with `ProtectedRoute`.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Collapsible sidebar component rendering navigation links, default link categories, and user-defined custom links with expandable category sections and a custom link manager dialog.
frontend/src/components/CustomLinkManage: Dialog-based UI for managing custom sidebar links, supporting add, edit, and delete operations with form validation, icon picking, and custom category support.
Simple footer component displaying developer attribution (Shubham Rathore) and a caffeine.ai build credit with the current year.
Renders the top navigation header with a sidebar toggle, logo, secure connection indicator, and a user profile dropdown menu that supports logout functionality.
Provides the main dashboard layout shell combining the header, collapsible sidebar, a textured main content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/DeleteAccountCon: Alert dialog that requires the user to type 'DELETE' to confirm permanent account deletion, then calls the delete mutation and clears the session.
frontend/src/components/IconPicker.tsx: A searchable grid picker component that lets users select an icon from the available Lucide icons defined in ICON_MAP.
frontend/src/components/LogoutConfirmati: Simple alert dialog asking the user to confirm logout before invoking the provided onConfirm callback.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Full-page form for new users to create their profile by entering name, username, optional email, and a vault password that is hashed before registration.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Guards child routes by checking Internet Identity authentication and profile load state, showing loading/error screens or the ProfileSetupModal for unregistered users.
frontend/src/data/defaultLinks.ts: Defines the default categorized quick-links (bank, email, investment, services, payments) and the ICON_MAP/AVAILABLE_ICONS used throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profile, custom links, and vault notes CRUD, using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a military-themed dark color palette using CSS custom properties (oklch) with custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page displaying a personalized welcome banner and stat cards for quick links, custom links, and vault notes counts, with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with a military-themed UI that presents an Internet Identity authentication button and feature highlights for the AstraVault app.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: React settings page with sections for changing vault password, updating user profile, toggling email 2FA, and deleting account, using custom query hooks and form validation.
frontend/src/pages/VaultPage.tsx: React page for an AES-256-GCM encrypted private vault with unlock/reset screens and CRUD operations for encrypted notes using client-side encryption utilities.
frontend/src/utils/encryption.ts: Client-side Web Crypto API utilities providing AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt for vault notes (PBKDF2 key derivation) and SHA-256 password hashing.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and hash cleanup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a military-themed design system with custom colors (military green, gold, dark surfaces), fonts (Rajdhani, Inter), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing AstraVault's architecture, existing features, known issues, and versioning metadata for a full-stack secure dashboard app with React frontend and Node.js/MongoDB backend.
